mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, sender, sender_name, content, is_read, create_time FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender, m.sender_name, m.content, m.is_read, m.create_time FROM message m INNER JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_time FROM message GROUP BY conversation_id ) latest ON m.conversation_id = latest.conversation_id AND m.create_time = latest.max_time ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT id, conversation_id, sender, sender_name, content, is_read, create_time FROM message WHERE sender != #{sender} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE sender != #{sender} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message(id, conversation_id, sender, sender_name, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{sender}, #{senderName}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE sender != #{sender} AND is_read = 0
